# Notes

1. In case of an unforeseen holiday, a Saturday/Sunday will be converted into a working day.
2. In the event of a change in the date of a holiday announced by the Government of India through the media, the Institute shall observe the holiday accordingly, and a working day created in lieu will work as per the timetable of that holiday.
3. *Course coordinator/instructor may decide and conduct class tests with internal arrangements.*

---
